$comment: FC17.5 D-CSUBSET-EMPTY-INITIALIZER (C23 6.7.10): the {} empty initializer + scalar brace-init end-to-end. `int z = {}` -> 0 (6.7.10p11 zero-init); `int v = {35}` -> 35 (6.7.10p12 single expression); `int cl = (int){7}` -> 7 (the SCALAR compound literal — the flip of the pre-FC17.5 aggregate-only fail-loud pin); `int *p = {}` -> null (p==0 contributes 0, a non-null would add 100 and break the exit); `struct Pair s = {}` + `int arr[3] = {}` are the AGGREGATE zero-fill regression guards (already-working routes the new scalar arm must not perturb). exit = 0+35+7+0+0+0+0+0 = 42, data-model independent. RED-on-revert: without the scalar arm the three scalar brace forms fail to compile.
